visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female character with a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white lace top stands in a warehouse retail setting. She holds a large pink rectangular box labeled Pork Floss Egg Roll featuring a cartoon pig. Stacks of identical boxes form the background. She smiles and points at the cartoon pig on the box while speaking. (2) Close-up shots focusing on the box's graphics, specifically the cartoon pig illustration and the image of the egg rolls. The woman's hands are visible as she points at these details, and the camera follows the movement of the box as she rotates it slightly. (3) Transition to an indoor home setting. Two women are seated at a white table. One is the woman from Phase 1 wearing the bucket hat, the other wears a black beret and a dark grey top. They hold the individual packaging of the egg rolls in front of the camera. (4) Close-up shots of the product packaging being manipulated by hands. One woman holds a small individual sachet while the larger box remains on the table. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the colorful packaging and the textures of the women's clothing. (5) A detailed close-up shot of a broken egg roll. The camera focuses on the interior filling, which consists of densely packed shredded pork floss. The outer layers of the egg roll appear thin and flaky with a golden-brown color. (6) Both women sit together and eat the product. They chew enthusiastically, nodding and gesturing with their hands to express approval. The background is a domestic interior with shelves and soft toys visible, creating a casual atmosphere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 勾勾肉鬆蛋捲. [Variety]: 肉鬆蛋捲. (2) [Subtitle]: 剛剛妹妹抱著這說長得有點像比爾我覺得像你才對我就覺得一定要試試看. (3) [Subtitle]: 臺灣豬然後配蛋捲聽起來就很好吃可是封面做的像童話故事書那麼可愛這豬豬能吃嗎會好吃嗎. [Variety]: 童話故事書. (4) [Subtitle]: 試試看是不是臺灣的肉鬆都很厲害然後是興麥蛋捲烘焙王國我真的沒吃過欸第一次聽到這個牌子. (5) [Subtitle]: Let's try it. [Variety]: 好市多 9月超級黑馬. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為他是肉鬆蛋捲他這裡面有24入所以每一個蛋捲是15塊錢. (7) [Subtitle]: 打開以後它的包裝也會讓你方便食用裡面的肉鬆塞好塞滿整條滿滿的肉鬆配上一層一層酥脆的蛋捲皮. (8) [Subtitle]: 超級好吃料非常誠意肉鬆本身有點濕潤所以它不會吸乾你的口水反而是吃起來就是好吃好香又來一根. [Variety]: 超級好吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 料多實在又可愛然後肉鬆給好給滿超誠意這是一個非常值得買的9月黑馬.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators participating in the review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white lace top. The other wears a black beret and a dark grey mesh top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene is set inside a Costco warehouse with tall stacks of boxed products. The later scenes take place at a white indoor table with home decor items like plush toys in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice speaks with a bright, ascending pitch, introducing the product while standing in a large retail space. Upbeat electronic-pop BGM with a steady, driving rhythm plays at a consistent volume. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal warehouse hum. (2) Vocal delivery becomes more rapid as the speaker describes the packaging. The music continues without interruption, providing a constant energetic pulse. (3) Transition in vocal texture as a second female voice joins in. A cardboard rustling sound is heard as the box lid is opened, punctuating the narrative transition. (4) Distinct plastic rustling sounds are heard as the individual snacks are handled. The voices are layered and overlapping, indicating high arousal and excitement. (5) A sharp, percussive crunching sound occurs as the speakers bite into the egg rolls. This is followed by vocalized sounds of enjoyment and approval. (6) Both speakers conclude with enthusiastic summary remarks, their voices slightly higher in pitch and volume to signal a positive recommendation. The BGM maintains its tempo until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote the Ximai Pork Floss Egg Rolls sold at Costco, emphasizing their value for money, filling quantity, and pleasant taste through an energetic and interactive duo presentation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Specific focus on brand name (興麥) and retailer (Costco) with detailed price breakdown and high-praise evaluation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media edit with dense subtitling and fast-paced audio-visual synchronization designed for engagement.
